name: Spud Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 15 oz. cans pinto beans, rinsed & drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, sauté onion in oil over high heat until browned.
2. Add garlic, jalapeno, chili powder, cumin, allspice, basil, and oregano. Sauté, stirring often, about 2 minutes.
3. Add tomatoes with juice and vegetable broth, stirring to loosen bits of browned food on the bottom of the pan.
4. Bring to a boil.
5. Add potatoes and bell pepper; bring back to a boil.
6. Cook, uncovered, over medium heat for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Add beans and cook another 10-15 minutes.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
